step.title: Finalize and Handoff
step.goal: Write the locked Design Summary into the ticket body, stamp last_updated, re-validate the bundle, and present the handoff to ticket-structure.

substep.title: Write Design Summary to Worklog
substep.action:
Append {{session.design_summary_final}} to the worklog file. Use the Edit tool. The section's heading is "## Design Summary" (level 2; the worklog uses level-2 headings for each phase-gate summary like Readiness Summary, Design Summary, etc.).
Placement: after the Q↔R Readiness Summary section in the worklog (which ticket-grill wrote in its step 6e). The worklog journal reads:
- Orient Summary (written by ticket-orient) - Q↔R Readiness Summary (written by ticket-grill) - Design Summary (written here) - (later: Structure Outline, Writing Plan, Verify Session — written by downstream skills)

substep.title: Update Frontmatter If Children Changed
substep.action:
If any new DRs were spawned during D-phase (rare; usually DR creation happens in ticket-grill, but possible if a foundational reversal cascaded into a new DR), update the ticket's frontmatter `children:` array to include the new DR's alias.
If D-phase did not spawn new DRs, this substep is a no-op.

substep.title: Stamp last_updated
substep.action: uv run {base_dir}/scripts/stamp-frontmatter.py --file "{{session.worklog_path}}" --note "D-phase complete; Design Summary written; ready for ticket-structure. Strikes: {{session.foundational_strikes}}/3."
substep.note: Per Lock 27, stamp-frontmatter.py REPLACES last_updated_note. The strike count is captured in the note for audit trail — ticket-verify will read this and surface if strikes > 0.

check.action: Halt. Surface validation errors. Do NOT auto-fix; investigate which write step in this skill produced malformed output.

substep.title: Present Final Handoff
substep.template-output:
Design phase complete. Bundle ready for Structure.
**Bundle location**: {{session.bundle_dir}}
**Design Summary** (now in ticket body):
{{session.design_summary_final}}
**Strike counter status**: {{session.foundational_strikes}}/3 {{if strikes > 0:}} ⚠️ This session had {{session.foundational_strikes}} foundational reversal(s). The questions file logs each strike. ticket-verify will surface these for review during the Verify phase.
**Next action**: invoke `ticket-structure` from the ticketsmith menu (cmd: TS) to define the ticket's section/Parts shape and the tag-driven content recipe. ticket-structure will load this bundle, read the Design Summary, and propose the ticket's internal structure.
If a scope or design concern surfaces during ticket-structure, that skill can loop back here (ticket-design) — bring fresh eyes; the strike counter resets per ticket-design invocation.

section.title: The Design Summary is a contract
section.description:
Once written into the ticket body, the Design Summary becomes the contract for the downstream phases. ticket-structure refers to the artifact chain to choose ticket sections. ticket-plan refers to the decision points to schedule subagent batches. ticket-write expands risk areas into concrete acceptance criteria. ticket-verify checks that the final ticket honors the Design Summary's promises.
Drift from the Design Summary in downstream phases is a verify finding (severity: High typically, Critical if the drift invalidates a locked DR).

section.title: Strike count visibility
section.description: The strike count is captured in last_updated_note (per Lock 27, which replaces on each stamp). ticket-verify reads the latest last_updated_note and surfaces if strikes > 0. This is the durable audit trail; the strike_log session variable itself does NOT persist to disk (per the earlier-locked design decision that strikes live in session state only).

section.title: Bundle status remains 'draft'
section.description: D-phase does NOT transition the ticket to 'ready'. That transition happens at the end of ticket-verify's final step, gated by the user. ticket-design leaves status=draft.
